rules.title: Network IOC Detection [2128a8906d9c]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Network Threat Intel [2128a8906d9c]
id: cdb-net-2128a8906d9c
status: production
description: >
    Auto-generated detection rule for 12 malicious IPs and 16 malicious domains
    from CYBERDUDEBIVASH SENTINEL APEX threat intelligence feeds.
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-27
modified: 2026-04-27
tags:
    - attack.command_and_control
    - attack.t1071
    - attack.t1090
logsource:
    category: firewall
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        DestinationIp:
            - '1.53.114.181'
            - '104.28.160.197'
            - '114.10.99.126'
            - '124.248.183.139'
            - '130.12.182.154'
            - '157.15.40.74'
            - '202.56.2.126'
            - '209.146.60.26'
            - '49.156.40.126'
            - '83.147.12.83'
            - '62.60.226.200'
            - '21.1.1.50'
        DestinationHostname|contains:
            - 'docs.metasploit.com'
            - 'gmail.com'
            - 'metasploit.com'
            - 'api.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'blog.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'intel.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'tools.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'www.cyberdudebivash.com'
            - 'file.io'
            - 'java.io'
            - 'vibing-api-ccegdhbrg2d6bsd7.b02.azurefd.net'
            - 'security.snyk.io'
            - 'raw.githubusercontent.com'
            - 'issues.apache.org'
            - 'blog.hartwork.org'
    condition: selection
level: medium
falsepositives:
    - Shared hosting infrastructure
    - CDN/cloud provider IP overlap
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
    - https://cyberdudebivash.com/threat-intel

rules.title: File Hash Detection [2128a8906d9c]
rules.content:

rules.title: Phishing Detection [2128a8906d9c]
rules.content:
title: CDB SENTINEL APEX - Phishing Sender Detection [2128a8906d9c]
id: cdb-phish-2128a8906d9c
status: production
description: Detects emails from known malicious senders
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX v51
date: 2026-04-27
tags:
    - attack.initial_access
    - attack.t1566
logsource:
    category: email
    product: any
detection:
    selection:
        SenderAddress:
            - 'bcoles@gmail.com'
            - 'theLightCosine@metasploit.com'
            - 'bivash@cyberdudebivash.com'
    condition: selection
level: high
falsepositives:
    - Spoofed sender addresses
references:
    - https://intel.cyberdudebivash.com
